name: In Boise, can I sue someone besides my employer for machine fail?
description: Yes in Idaho, sue third-parties within 2 years[2].

mainEntity.name: In Boise, can I sue someone besides my employer for machine fail?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes in Idaho, sue third-parties within 2 years[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, third-party like manufacturer if negligent.** Idaho allows alongside comp, 2-year limit[2]. **Key factors:** Prove defect. **Practical guidance:** Attorney investigates; comp first. Common for faulty equipment.
